locations.description: A creative arts community featuring live folk and indigenous music every weekend evening.
locations.practicePhrase: Tiehua Music Village is famous for live folk music performances.

keyVocabulary.definition: a small community or settlement
keyVocabulary.exampleSentence: The village comes alive every Friday night with music.

keyVocabulary.definition: a live show or entertainment event
keyVocabulary.exampleSentence: The outdoor performance attracted hundreds of visitors.

keyVocabulary.definition: originating from a particular place; native
keyVocabulary.exampleSentence: Indigenous music and crafts are celebrated at the village.

keyVocabulary.definition: relating to traditional community culture
keyVocabulary.exampleSentence: Folk musicians gather here every weekend.

locations.description: A rare urban forest park featuring Pipa Lake, cycling paths, and diverse bird species.
locations.practicePhrase: Taitung Forest Park has beautiful cycling trails near Pipa Lake.

keyVocabulary.definition: a large area covered with trees
keyVocabulary.exampleSentence: The forest park is a green oasis in the heart of the city.

keyVocabulary.definition: a path or track through natural terrain
keyVocabulary.exampleSentence: The cycling trail winds through the entire forest park.

keyVocabulary.definition: the variety of plant and animal life in an area
keyVocabulary.exampleSentence: The park is known for its incredible biodiversity.

keyVocabulary.definition: a shallow body of water separated from the sea
keyVocabulary.exampleSentence: Pipa Lake looks like a small lagoon surrounded by pine trees.

locations.description: A famous hot spring resort area nestled in a valley with sodium bicarbonate springs.
locations.practicePhrase: Zhiben Hot Springs is the perfect place to relax after hiking.

keyVocabulary.definition: a naturally heated underground water source
keyVocabulary.exampleSentence: Soaking in a hot spring is wonderfully relaxing.

keyVocabulary.definition: a place for rest, recreation, and accommodation
keyVocabulary.exampleSentence: The resort offers both indoor and outdoor hot spring pools.

keyVocabulary.definition: having healing or restorative properties
keyVocabulary.exampleSentence: The mineral-rich water has therapeutic benefits for the skin.

keyVocabulary.definition: a type of alkaline mineral found in spring water
keyVocabulary.exampleSentence: Zhiben's sodium bicarbonate springs are gentle on the skin.

locations.description: A volcanic island famous for snorkeling, the world-famous submarine hot springs, and clear turquoise waters.
locations.practicePhrase: Green Island is famous for snorkeling and its unique submarine hot springs.

keyVocabulary.definition: swimming with a breathing tube to observe underwater life
keyVocabulary.exampleSentence: Snorkeling around Green Island reveals stunning coral reefs.

keyVocabulary.definition: existing or happening under the sea
keyVocabulary.exampleSentence: The submarine hot spring is one of only three in the world.

keyVocabulary.definition: an underwater structure made of coral
keyVocabulary.exampleSentence: The coral reef surrounding the island is home to colorful fish.

keyVocabulary.definition: a blue-green color like the sea
keyVocabulary.exampleSentence: The turquoise waters around Green Island are crystal clear.

locations.description: A coral reef islet connected to the mainland by an iconic eight-arch bridge, home to rare sea creatures.
locations.practicePhrase: The eight-arch bridge at Sanxiantai is one of Taiwan's most iconic landmarks.

keyVocabulary.definition: a bridge with curved supporting structures
keyVocabulary.exampleSentence: The eight-arch bridge stretches gracefully across the ocean.

keyVocabulary.definition: a very small island
keyVocabulary.exampleSentence: The islet is accessible only via the famous arch bridge.

keyVocabulary.definition: the outline of a coast; the shore of the sea
keyVocabulary.exampleSentence: Sanxiantai offers breathtaking views of the rugged coastline.

keyVocabulary.definition: a collection of myths or traditional stories
keyVocabulary.exampleSentence: According to local mythology, three immortals once rested on the island.
